channel.title: Evaluation on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Evaluation on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: ai: Outcome-driven learning systems: Enterprise RL with OpenEnv and Foundry
item.description:
Microsoft says its Build 2026 Foundry releases fit together as an outcome-driven learning system for enterprise reinforcement learning, centered on OpenEnv and Foundry. The post positions hosted agents, Toolboxes, Foundry IQ, Memory, Managed Compute, fine-tuning, Frontier Tuning, and a new evaluation/optimization stack as supporting pieces of that system.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog

item.title: security: Turn specs into evals for any agent with ASSERT
item.description:
ASSERT is an open-source framework that turns natural-language behavior requirements into executable evaluations for AI models and agents. It is presented as a way to create evaluations and regression tests from specs.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: azure: [In preview] Public Preview: Observability developer experience in Azure Developer CLI (azd)
item.description:
Azure Developer CLI (azd) now has a public preview for observability developer experience, aimed at adding an evaluation loop to agents created with Microsoft Foundry. The preview supports hosted-agent lifecycle workflows in azd, including creating, provisioning, deploying, and initializing evaluation assets.

  • Source: Azure Updates
